mapper.select:
SELECT customer_idx as customerIdx, customer_name as customerName, image_file as imageFile, image_width as imageWidth, image_height as imageHeight, url, order_no as orderNo
FROM customer
ORDER BY order_no desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer ( customer_name, image_file, image_width, image_height, url, order_no ) VALUES ( #{customerName}, #{imageFile}, #{imageWidth}, #{imageHeight}, #{url}, #{orderNo} )
